_comment: Carrier agent bonus/incentive programs for the ProducerStack bonus tracker. Researched from public web sources 2026-07-10. Scope = Insurance Toolkits FEX carrier list. bonus_type: cash_percent (% of AP), cash_flat ($ at tier), per_policy ($ per policy count), lead_credit (marketing/lead $), trip (non-cash incentive), none_public (no public program found), portal_only (program exists, tiers gated behind agent login). status: active_2026 = verified current; last_documented = latest public version, current-year terms unverified; expired/discontinued as noted. VERIFY portal_only and last_documented entries against carrier agent portals before paying out projections. CARRIER-ONLY: IMO/agency-level bonuses (e.g. FFL VP bonus) are intentionally excluded.

tiers.threshold_label: >= $55,000 qualified life production credits in period

carriers.period: 2025-12-01 to 2026-05-29 (paid by 2026-05-29; premium applied through 2026-06-15; bonus paid by 2026-06-30)
carriers.requirements: 6-mo persistency >= 84%; 12-mo persistency >= 72%; premium applied ratio >= 77%; no controlled business; annuities/call centers excluded
carriers.notes: Current qualification window closed 5/29/26. Next-period flyer not yet public as of 7/10/26 — check tools.americoagent.com.

carriers.carrier: American Amicable (also Occidental Life, Pioneer American, Pioneer Security, IA American)

tiers.threshold_label: $7,500-$9,999 paid annualized life premium in one month

carriers.period: monthly, ongoing
carriers.requirements: active and in good standing; placement and persistency requirements; awards not cumulative
carriers.notes: Applies across the whole Am-Am family incl. Occidental and Pioneer American.

carriers.carrier: Mutual of Omaha (United of Omaha) — Living Promise

tiers.threshold_label: >= $25,000 qualifying ANBP net-issued per calendar quarter

carriers.period: calendar quarters (Q1-Q4)
carriers.requirements: placement >= 70%; 3-mo persistency >= 91%; appointed >= 4 months and >= 10 policies in past 3 years; no controlled business/internal replacements; Living Promise, Term Life Express, IUL Express, Guaranteed ADvantage, Critical Advantage all credit 1:1
carriers.notes: 2026 flyer not public — verify current terms on producer.mutualofomaha.com. Separate: Mutual Sales Leaders trip at 250,000 annual production credits.

carriers.program: Brokerage Convention (trip only — no public cash AP bonus)

tiers.threshold_label: $100,000 first-year paid AP + 5 paid cases in calendar year
tiers.payout: Convention trip (2026: Montage Los Cabos, Apr 12-16)

carriers.period: calendar year (CY2025 production for 2026 trip)
carriers.requirements: paid premium only; term/WL/IUL credit; annuities excluded; brokerage channel
carriers.notes: No public cash production bonus exists for Transamerica FE; New Horizons lists no incentives for this carrier.

carriers.period: bonuses paid monthly per Ethos FAQ; schedules vary year to year
carriers.requirements: unknown — published only to appointed agents at agents.ethoslife.com/rewards
carriers.notes: Program confirmed to exist; no public tiers. Do not display projected amounts.

tiers.payout: up to $10,000 cumulative (intermediate tiers in rules PDF)

carriers.requirements: policy-count based, NOT AP; net of not-takens/chargebacks/lapses; no self/family business; call centers excluded; splits credited fractionally; paid within 35 days of month-end; auto-enrolled
carriers.notes: SIWL (SimpliNow Legacy/Legacy Max) only — NO bonus on GIWL. Tier amounts change each quarter.

carriers.carrier: Aetna Senior Supplemental / CVS Accendo (Protection Series)

tiers.payout: per-policy cash, historically up to $125/policy; table varies by quarter

carriers.period: recurring quarterly; last public detail = Q4 2025 (apps 10/1-12/31/25)
carriers.requirements: 80% persistency; policy in force 90 days; min $15/mo EFT; no self/family business; prorated by split
carriers.notes: Q3 2026 flyer is portal-only (AetnaSeniorProducts.com). FE inclusion in kickers varies by quarter.

carriers.program: Q4 2025 OEP bundle bonus + FE Leaders' Conference (both expired)
carriers.period: both qualification windows ended 2025-12-31
carriers.requirements: expired programs: $50/FE policy bundled w/ Med Supp (Oct-Dec 2025); top-25 FE trip at >= $25,000 issued FE AP (Jul-Dec 2025)
carriers.notes: No public 2026 FE successor found; current PIPAC Aflac incentive is Med Supp only.

carriers.period: calendar quarters 2026 (documented: Q2 2026); President's Club Jan 1-Dec 31 2026: $50k/$55k/$60k/$65k AP + 18 lives -> Amelia Island trip + $500/$1,000/$1,500/$2,000 cash
carriers.requirements: 2026 business >= 85% persistency; 2025 business >= 70%; GuideStar FE counts 100%; Patriot Series EXCLUDED; no self/family business
carriers.notes: Best-documented AP-tier cash bonus of the non-contracted set.

carriers.period: trip Jul 9-14 2026; qualification window per flyer 7986-0625
carriers.requirements: thresholds in image-based flyer, not text-extractable
carriers.notes: No public cash AP tiers; bonus schedules released to appointed agents only.

tiers.threshold_label: 5 credits minimum to redeem; 1 credit per issued+paid case
tiers.payout: cash reward credits (e.g. $50/policy on some ancillary products)

carriers.period: ongoing
carriers.requirements: issued and paid business; marketed for ancillary products — FE (Vantage Secure) inclusion unverified
carriers.notes: Verify FE eligibility and current amounts at agent.bflic.com.
No public agent AP bonus or convention.
Fraternal, mostly captive; no public tiers.
See Oxford Life entry — Oxford's producer incentive program may apply via the Oxford family.

carriers.period: presumed CY2026 production for 2027 trip
carriers.requirements: thresholds in image-based flyer
carriers.notes: No public cash AP bonus; headline comp is 120% FYC + 50% advances.
Chubb discloses contests exist at its discretion; no FE-specific program published.
IMO page lists 'No incentives from this carrier'.

carriers.program: Monthly Lead Credit Bonus + President's Club trip

tiers.threshold_label: >= $5,000 net issued AP in a calendar month
tiers.payout: 5% of AP as lead-purchase credit (any vendor), no cap

carriers.period: monthly, ongoing; President's Club trip qualification Jan 1-Dec 31 2026 (Dublin/K Club, June 2027; threshold not public)
carriers.requirements: persistency > 80%; life products only
carriers.source_date: lead-credit flyer 07/2019, still cited; trip flyer ~03/2026
carriers.notes: Long-running program; re-verify current terms.
Small regional carrier (AR/LA/MS/MO/OK/TN/TX).

tiers.threshold_label: >= 25,000 points/quarter (1 pt = $1 net paid commissionable AP; PlanRight 100%, BrightFuture 50%)
tiers.payout: 12% cash (higher tiers exist, shown in ezbiz tracker)

carriers.period: quarterly 2026 (points reset each quarter; paid within 30 days of quarter end)
carriers.requirements: min 6 apps/quarter; personal production only; placement >= 60%; persistency 90%@3mo / 85%@6mo / 80%@9mo / 75%@13mo; NY excluded; no controlled business
carriers.notes: BrightFuture AP counts only 50% toward points.
IMOs say bonus incentives become visible after appointment; nothing public.

carriers.program: Capitol Club (Quick Start / PERSONA Rewards / Preferred Agent Bonus)

tiers.threshold_label: Quick Start: $6,000 NPA in first 6 months

carriers.period: calendar year (Preferred Agent); monthly (PERSONA: $15 per $1,000 life NPA)
carriers.requirements: Platinum 85% 13-mo persistency + 80% placement; Gold 80%/75%; Silver 75%/75%
carriers.notes: Document is old — verify amounts on GPM Agent Access before relying on them.

carriers.period: promo-specific windows; historic example $20/app (2023)
carriers.requirements: good standing; per-promo minimums
carriers.notes: 2026 life-side promo, if any, is portal-only (eapp.gtlic.com); current public GTL bonuses are Medicare-side.

tiers.threshold_label: all life plans (except Child Guard) with 13-mo persistency >= 78%

carriers.period: annual
carriers.requirements: 13-mo persistency >= 78%
carriers.source_date: checked 2026-07-10 (tier figure from older forum post)
carriers.notes: Program exists; current 2026 rules are in Agent Forum portal.

carriers.program: top-producer awards / incentive trips (no published tiers)
carriers.notes: PRODUCT FLAG: KSKJ FE replaced by 'Precision Plan' effective 2026-04-08.

carriers.period: 2026 trips: Boston Jul 7-10; Ireland Jul 11-15 (CY2025 qualification)
carriers.requirements: not public
carriers.notes: No public cash AP bonus.

carriers.program: Agent Quality & Production Bonus + 2026 Incentive Trip

tiers.threshold_label: >= 10 net issued policies/month at Gold or Platinum status

carriers.period: monthly, ongoing; trip: CY2025 credits (200,000; Ordinary Life = 2.0 credits/$1 AP, i.e. ~$100k life AP) -> Kaua'i Hawaii Jun 8-13 2026
carriers.requirements: Gold >= 70% persistency; Platinum 75%@13mo + 60%@25mo + >= $3,000 AP/quarter; trip: >= 5 policies placed prior quarter, no debit balance, 65% projected 13-mo persistency
carriers.source_date: trip flyer 01/2025; cash bonus article undated
carriers.notes: Re-verify monthly cash bonus terms in MyLBL portal.
Current incentives portal-only (agentportal.lifeshieldnational.com).
Cash bonuses/free leads/trips exist but vary by agency director; no published schedule.

carriers.program: Agent Contest 2026 (MYGA annuity only — not FE)
carriers.requirements: active appointment; chargebacks netted; splits prorated
carriers.notes: No bonus found on their FE (Senior Life I/II) products.
Markets 'highly competitive commissions' + next-day pay; no AP bonus tiers.

carriers.program: Producer Incentive Program (points) + IMO 5% lead credit

tiers.payout: points redeemable ~3-4% of qualifying premium as leads/travel/cash, up to $10,000/yr
5% of sales as lead credit (use within 60 days)

carriers.period: carrier program: calendar year; IMO credit: monthly
carriers.requirements: 6-app minimum; good standing; no debit balance; no production pooling
carriers.source_date: brochure Rev. 1-2016 (structure dated); IMO page current
carriers.notes: 2016 brochure — verify 2026 point values on Oxford agent portal. Lead credit is FexContracting-specific; your IMO terms may differ.
Flat 115% FYC + 4.5% renewals; no bonus tiers.
Bonus schedules released only after appointment.

carriers.program: Agent Sales Trip (2026: Montage Deer Valley, Jun 7-10)

tiers.threshold_label: 60,000 weighted production in CY2025 (Jet Term/Jet WL = 150% of AP; SIWL/GDB/GI = 100%; SPWL = 15% of SP); top 30 qualify

carriers.period: CY2025 qualification (2026 trip); 2026-qualifying successor not yet public
carriers.requirements: min 12 issued life apps; >= 5,000 credits Oct-Dec; NTEL < 28%; 13-mo persistency > 70%; activation > 70%
carriers.notes: Check agent.royalneighbors.org for the 2026-qualifying version.
Living Legacy withdrawn effective 2026-03-09; annualized commissions ended 2025-12-18. Remove from active tracker.
Value prop is high street contracts (up to 140%), not bonuses.

tiers.threshold_label: issue-paid AP above $1,500 in a month
tiers.payout: 10% of total issue-paid AP as lead/marketing credit (agent matches dollar-for-dollar; credits roll over)

carriers.period: monthly, ongoing
carriers.requirements: issue-paid business only; approved lead vendors (DM/telemarketing/Facebook)
carriers.source_date: IMO pages undated; SNL agent page updated 01/2026 (password-protected)
carriers.notes: SNL also runs contests/bonuses through the year — portal-only.

carriers.period: rolling monthly ($5,000/mo to $2,000,000/mo agency levels raise commission up to ~150%+ FYC)
carriers.requirements: not published
carriers.notes: Levels raise commission %, not flat cash bonuses.

carriers.period: CY2026 qualification -> Riviera Maya (Etereo/Auberge) Apr 28-May 2 2027
carriers.requirements: thresholds portal-only (member-restricted brochure)
carriers.notes: No public cash AP-tier bonus.
